description_long: This bird has a streamlined body with a predominantly white underside and a darker, almost black, upper side. Its head is sharply pointed with a long, straight beak, and there is a distinct white patch on the side of its face near the eye. The wings are slender and elongated, blending from dark gray to black, while the tail is straight and tapers to a point. The legs are short and not prominently visible, suggesting they are tucked close to the body. The plumage pattern is mottled, with a mix of white, gray, and black, giving it a striking contrast suitable for urban environments.
description: A sleek bird with a long, pointed beak, mottled black and white plumage, and a streamlined body with elongated wings and a pointed tail.
description_view_0: Top-down view showing the bird's dark upper body, pointed beak, and the contrast between the black back and white underparts.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the long, straight beak, white facial patch, and the slender, elongated body and wings.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the tapered, pointed tail and the subtle gradient from dark to lighter feathers on the back.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the same elongated beak and body, with the white underbelly and dark upper wing clearly visible.
attribute_plumage_pattern: mottled black and white with distinct facial patch and dark upperparts
